Added a true no-work resume fast-path that exits before ffprobe/backend initialization when all preprocess outputs already exist, and added a guard that fails loudly when multiple sources would collapse onto the same mirrored output path because --base-dir is too narrow. Verified with focused pytest (9 passed for test_preprocess_clean_speech.py, 6 passed for test_dataset_scripts.py) plus full suite (1048 passed).
